vendor: IBM configuration outputs shared by TD SYNNEX; final discounted reseller quote is not present in the bundle
quote_source: No single readable consolidated quote file. Best available source is the combined IBM ECMSSD configuration outputs dated 2026-04-22; the listed workbook 230427CSI UEA deal reg Quotes.xlsx is unreadable due to invalid XML.
subtotal: GBP 3,937,792.40 ex VAT (sum of system totals, excluding shipping)
vat: Not stated in the source files
total: GBP 3,947,866.36 ex VAT if the stated non-discountable shipping charges are added; VAT is still not shown
lead_time: Not stated; customer requested arrival date shown as 2026-05-06
inclusions: 2 x Diamondback Tape Library systems with combined OTC value GBP 3,076,942.08 and combined monthly maintenance GBP 2,900.54

Diamondback line items include Full Capacity License, 10 x LTO10 FH Fibre Channel Drive entries per system, 2 x PDUs in frame, IEC 309 power cords, dual 2.8m power cord PDU-to-PSU, fiber tape drive wrap tool, diagnostic cartridge for LTO10, cleaning cartridge, service magazine, and a 3-year ServicePac warranty/maintenance line
2 x lots of 300 LTO-10 30TB labeled cartridges with combined OTC value GBP 603,768.00
Media labeling settings explicitly include DUM000 start, red alpha prefix background, and vibrant label background
4 x SAN24B-7 switch builds with combined OTC value GBP 257,082.32

Each switch build explicitly includes SAN24B-7 base unit, 2 x long-wave secure SFPs, 1 x 8-port 32Gbps SW SFP bundle, 1 x 8-port 32Gbps SW upgrade, 10 x OM3 LC/LC 10m cables, and 3-year IBM Storage Expert Care Advanced
exclusions: Final reseller discounting or deal-registration pricing outcome
Final consolidated commercial quote document / terms
Host/SAN cable from plant on the Diamondback library configuration
Additional services beyond the selected ServicePac / Expert Care combinations
assumptions: IBM configurator notes say prices are informational list prices, subject to change, and may not reflect the price actually paid by the customer
Shipping is treated separately because it is shown as non-discountable and outside the system totals
The three readable configuration outputs are treated as one batch because the TD SYNNEX email frames them as a single request for UEA
This summary relies on the readable TXT/CSV/XML exports because the nominal XLSX quote workbook could not be opened
risks: Primary workbook source is unreadable, so there is no readable single-file commercial source of truth
Diamondback file name says 8xLTO10-FC and the email request asks for 8 LTO10 drives, but the readable configuration shows 10 x AGH4 LTO10 FH Fibre Channel Drive entries per system
Switch request asks for 12 x SW SFPs and 2 x LW SFPs per switch, but the readable switch configuration only makes the 2 LW SFPs explicit and shows one 8-port SW SFP bundle plus one 8-port upgrade
Presales note says LTO-10 media needs a starting VOLSER for each location, but the readable media config hard-codes DUM000
ServicePac warnings say selected ServicePacs cannot be combined with additional service offerings, and custom ServicePacs require scoping assistance
Lead time is not stated; only a requested arrival date is shown
flags: Monthly maintenance of GBP 2,900.54 is separate from the OTC totals
VAT is absent from all readable pricing outputs
